positive: A majestic, stylized constellation map depicted in deep indigo and vibrant turquoise hues, featuring geometric celestial bodies, interconnected glowing lines, and soft nebula clouds. The composition should be perfectly centered, designed as a repeating, high-contrast motif suitable for screen printing on fabric. The style should be a blend of sacred geometry and cosmic art deco, utilizing clean, sharp silhouettes and ethereal luminescence. Focus on strong symmetry and a mystical, tranquil mood. Intricate detail, vector-graphic quality, high contrast, perfect for apparel printing.
